events.title: Gallery Night
events.description: Celebrate Gallery Night at Coral Gables Museum with an evening of exhibitions, live music, and World Cup excitement. Explore four exhibitions, including two new America250 presentations, enjoy acoustic music in the Courtyard, happy hour specials, and watch two FIFA World Cup matches in the galleries. events.title: Gallery Night Watch Parties
events.description: World Cup Watch Parties continue at Coral Gables Museum as part of Gallery Night, bringing the excitement of the FIFA World Cup into an evening of art, music, and exhibitions.

events.title: FYE ULTRACLUB PRESENTS: E11EVEN MIAMI FUTBOL26 POP-OFF SERIES
G-EAZY AT E11EVEN FOURTH OF JULY
Fort Lauderdale 4th of July 2026 Spectacular: Beach Fireworks & Drone Show
events.description: Fort Lauderdale Beach and Las Olas Oceanside Park host a free, day-long 4th of July Spectacular with a kids' zone, inflatable water slides, beach games, and live music. The night features a drone show at 8:45 p.m. followed by fireworks over the ocean at 9 p.m., family fun all day on the sand.
events.venue: Las Olas Oceanside Park / Fort Lauderdale Beach

events.title: Miami July 4th 2026 Fireworks at Bayfront Park: America's Birthday Bash (250 United)
events.description: Celebrate America's 250th birthday at Bayfront Park in downtown Miami with a free, all-day Fourth of July festival featuring live concerts, food vendors, and a cutting-edge drone light show. The night ends with a spectacular fireworks display over Biscayne Bay, with free entry by RSVP, making it Miami's biggest family-friendly Independence Day celebration.

events.title: July 4th Spectacular at Tropical Park
events.description: Miami-Dade County's largest County-supported Fourth of July celebration, presented in partnership with Univision: live musical performances, DJs, food vendors, family-friendly activities, patriotic fun, and an evening fireworks show.
events.sourceName: Miami-Dade July 4th Spectacular at Tropical Park

events.title: Deerfield Beach July 4th 2026 Celebration: Free Beach Fireworks
events.description: The City of Deerfield Beach brings its free 4th of July Celebration back to the beach with live music, food trucks, and kids' activities from 4 to 9 p.m. The night caps off with fireworks over the ocean at 9 p.m., a great all-ages Independence Day outing.

events.title: 4th of July Celebration: North Beach
events.description: Starting at 5 PM dance to live music and let the kids have fun in the family zone. Music performances take the stage with entertainment by DJ Luc, MC Maria Salas and The Miami Beats Band. The nearby Miami Beach Bandshell at 7275 Collins Ave. will be transformed into a free outdoor roller disco from 5-9 p.m. Bring your own skates or blades. Miami Beach reside

events.title: City of Doral July 4th 2026 Independence Day Celebration & Fireworks
events.description: Doral Central Park hosts the City of Doral's free Independence Day Celebration with family games, food vendors, and festive activities for all ages. The night closes with a 25-minute fireworks finale beginning at 9:20 p.m., a fun all-ages way to celebrate the Fourth of July.

events.title: Coral Gables July 4th 2026 Fireworks Celebration at the Biltmore Hotel
events.description: Bring the family to the historic Biltmore Hotel for Coral Gables' Fourth of July celebration, featuring a patriotic concert by the Greater Miami Symphonic Band. The free festivities culminate in an aerial drone light show and fireworks at 9 p.m. honoring America's 250th birthday.

events.title: July 4th Roller Disco
events.description: Join us and our skate hosts, All Skates Go To Heaven, and DJs Kumi & Zac, to Celebrate Independence Day with a spin around the Bandshell! Free admission, bring your own skates or blades. Enjoy tunes even without skates from the Club Box Deck. Skate rental will be available (Free for Miami Beach residents with ID). events.title: Hollywood Beach July 4th 2026 Star-Spangled Spectacular Fireworks
events.description: Celebrate Independence Day on the Hollywood Beach Broadwalk at the free Star-Spangled Spectacular, with live entertainment beginning at 6 p.m. The festivities end with an offshore fireworks display at 9 p.m., a festive, family-friendly Fourth of July on the beach.

events.title: 4th of July Celebration: South Beach
events.description: From 8:30 to 10 PM, experience a majestic fireworks display set to live classical music on the shores of South Beach. Lincoln Road Farmer’s Market
events.description: On Meridian Avenue through Washington Avenue, local vendors gather along Lincoln Road to sell fruits, vegetables, fresh-cut flowers and more. Rain or shine, guests are welcome to explore the area to find regional treasures. Every Sunday at 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM on Lincoln Road.

events.title: Flip the Switch: Sea Turtle Beach Cleanup
